facebook.caption:
POV: you walked into Cung Điện Hải Vương not expecting much. You stayed two hours.

4.7 stars across 4,271 reviews. That number matters. This is Phu Quoc's aquarium and it earns every star. Sharks overhead. Reef fish at eye level. Kids losing their minds.

Not a beach day? This is your day sorted.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sharks swimming above your head at Cung Điện Hải Vương. The tunnel alone is worth it. 4.7 stars, 4,271 reviews. Phu Quoc delivers on this one.
